title: Calculator
description: This is a simple plugin where you can calculate almost anything you want!
body:
# About the Calculator Plugin
The Calculator Plugin for Minecraft is an easy-to-use tool that allows players to perform complex mathematical calculations directly within the game. By typing /calculate <expression>, you can compute almost any mathematical expression you can think of! This plugin is perfect for players who want to solve math problems on the fly, whether for fun or for in-game challenges.

## Features
The Calculator Plugin comes packed with a variety of built-in functions that make calculations a breeze. Here are some of the features you can use:

- Basic Calculations: Perform standard operations like addition, subtraction, multiplication, and division.

- Advanced Mathematical Functions: Access a wide range of advanced functions, including:

- abs(x): Returns the absolute value of x.
- acos(x): Computes the arc cosine of x.
- asin(x): Computes the arc sine of x.
- atan(x): Computes the arc tangent of x.
- cbrt(x): Calculates the cubic root of x.
- ceil(x): Rounds x up to the nearest integer.
- cos(x): Computes the cosine of x (in radians).
- cosh(x): Computes the hyperbolic cosine of x.
- exp(x): Raises Euler's number (e) to the power of x (e^x).
- floor(x): Rounds x down to the nearest integer.
- log(x): Computes the natural logarithm of x (base e).
- log10(x): Computes the logarithm of x (base 10).
- log2(x): Computes the logarithm of x (base 2).
- sin(x): Computes the sine of x (in radians).
- sinh(x): Computes the hyperbolic sine of x.
- sqrt(x): Calculates the square root of x.
- tan(x): Computes the tangent of x (in radians).
- tanh(x): Computes the hyperbolic tangent of x.
- signum(x): Returns the sign of x (1, 0, or -1).
# Support
If you have any questions or need assistance with the Calculator Plugin, feel free to join our [Discord server](https://discord.gg/ZnfNDDbnPW)! Our community is ready to help you with any issues or inquiries you may have.

With the Calculator Plugin, you can tackle any mathematical challenge while having fun in Minecraft!
